title: Cursed Fate: Special grade
description: this mod allows you to becoma a special grade in survival.
body:
This mod allows you to become a special grade in minecraft using Huragan's Cursed Fate mod!
the mod currently adds 1 scroll called ''Special grade scroll".(more to come later).
It allows you to reach the ultimate power and get movement abilities+extra power in Cursed Fate.
this scroll is **_not_**obtainible by mob drop.
instead,it is craftable by using rare and valuable items.(crafting recipe in media)

though this mod is perfectly playable and fun in singlepalyer,i advise using this on a server or a modpack to get the full experience of the abilities you obtain!

**_if you got any suggestions or wanna report bugs let me know in my discord server._**
([discord server](https://discord.gg/H2PFX3ck)
